failed_tests.name: Aspire.Cli.Tests.Commands.AppHostLauncherTests.LaunchDetachedAsync_ReportsForkProcessExitCodeWhenChildExitsBeforeMonitorAndStartTimeIsUnavailable
failed_tests.error:
Assert.Collection() Failure: Mismatched item count
Collection:     ["Failed to start the AppHost."]
Expected count: 2
Actual count:   1
failed_tests.reason: The test expects 2 specific output messages when a forked child process exits before the monitor starts, but only received 1 ('Failed to start the AppHost.'). The PR updates DCP dependency versions (eng/Version.Details.xml, eng/Versions.props) which affects AppHost process behavior. The missing second message suggests the DCP update changed fork/monitor initialization behavior.
